title: The Right to Romance
writer: Sidney Buchman, Henry McCarty, Myles Connolly
actors: Ann Harding, Robert Young, Nils Asther
plot: Dr "Peggy" Simmons, a successful and respected plastic surgeon, encounters job stress beyond her control. Lacking a social side to her harried life and desperately seeking romance, she travels to a beach-side resort for some R&R a...
